_comment: Hand-curation from the trio (Alex, broad strokes) that the clustering pass can't derive. Applied by gen-model.mjs after clustering. renames: code -> canonical title. recodes: oldCode -> newCode (change a work's deep-link slug; its posts retag, pair with a rename keyed on the newCode for the title). merges: sourceCode -> targetCode (source's posts retag to the target, source work drops out; folded codes intentionally stop resolving and fall back to the index).
